steps.title: Convert percentages to express a and b in terms of c
steps.content: Since $a$ is 3,600% of $c$: $$a = \frac{3600}{100} \cdot c = 36c$$ Since $c$ is 20% of $b$: $$c = \frac{20}{100} \cdot b = 0.2b$$ Solving for $b$: $$b = \frac{c}{0.2} = 5c$$

steps.title: Substitute into a - b = wc and solve for w
steps.content: Substitute $a = 36c$ and $b = 5c$ into $a - b = wc$: $$36c - 5c = wc$$ $$31c = wc$$ Dividing both sides by $c$ (which is positive): $$w = 31$$
